subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! A few days ago a letter was addressed unto thee, and now again one is being penned. Consider it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله چند روز پیش محرری بشما مرقوم شد حال باز نگاشته میگردد ملاحظه نما
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
